content.text:
Implemented the Jegantha mana payment fix.

What changed:
- Updated `JeganthaManaCondition` in:
  - `Mage.Sets/src/mage/cards/j/JeganthaTheWellspring.java`
- The condition no longer requires all generic mana to be paid before Jegantha mana can be used.
- Instead, Jegantha mana is allowed whenever there is any unpaid non-generic mana cost remaining:
  - colored mana: `{W}`, `{U}`, `{B}`, `{R}`, `{G}`
  - colorless mana: `{C}`

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the reported case:
  - Jegantha + 2 Mountains casting `Honden of Infinite Rage` (`{2}{R}`)
  - Manual mana pool payment confirmed Jegantha’s red mana could pay the red portion while Mountains paid generic.
- The targeted test passed:
  - `Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0`
- Per instructions, the temporary test was removed afterward with `git restore`.

Final working tree only has the source fix:
- `Mage.Sets/src/mage/cards/j/JeganthaTheWellspring.java`
